The '''''Elegance'' message drone''' was a [[message drone]] variant.

==Description==
[[File:EleganceMessageDroneAft-FF61.png|thumb|left|250px|An aft view of an ''Elegance'' message drone]]
An ''Elegance'' message drone measured at least nine meters long and almost entirely composed of engines. Its [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] could travel fast but it was limited to one [[Hyperspace/Legends|jump]] before it needed to refuel, and five jumps before its motors were destroyed by use. Having arrived in a system, the ''Elegance'' would broadcast a beacon signal to alert [[Starship/Legends|ships]] or [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] that it had arrived.

Since they were often used to transport classified government or military information, the ''Elegance'' was equipped with fail-safe [[Self-destruct mechanism/Legends|self-destruct systems]]; two [[electrite crystal]] triggers snapped together, destroying the drone and generating enough force to destroy everything within 600 meters to prevent it from falling into unauthorized hands.

==History==
Before the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] was established, most governments relied on such droids for long-range communications. During times of peace in the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], sometimes messages that had to travel only a short distance (such as from a [[Planet/Legends|planet]], to one of its satellites) were carried by ''Elegance'' drones.

Alternately, in times of political uncertainty, (much later when the HoloNet was active in most parts of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]), messages were sent over short distances using an ''Elegance'' drone, to avoid being picked up and decoded by eavesdroppers. Even under the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], some remote Imperial outposts kept several of these as backups in the event their comm satellites were destroyed.

Following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], an ''Elegance'' drone arrived at the [[Endor/Legends|Forest Moon of Endor]] addressed to [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] (who at that time had recently been killed during the battle) which was retrieved by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Having deactivated its self-destruct systems and decoded its data, the [[Alliance of Free Planets]] forces on the moon were alerted to the first of the [[Ssi-ruuvi invasions]] of [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]].
